label: RenderManager
documentation: The central manager for submitting draw calls to the rendering pipeline.

label: queue
documentation: Submit a draw call (QuadDrawCall or ModelDrawCall) to the RenderManager for execution.

label: QuadDrawCall
documentation: A draw call used to render a single 2D or 3D quadrilateral (quad) with custom coordinates, textures, and UVs.

label: create
documentation: Creates a new QuadDrawCall instance.

label: create
documentation: Creates a QuadDrawCall with a comment for annotation and code readability.

label: quad
detail: QuadDrawCall.quad(corner1: Vector3f, corner2: Vector3f, corner3: Vector3f, corner4: Vector3f): QuadDrawCall
documentation: Specify the coordinates for all four corners/vertices of the quad at once.

label: corner1
documentation: Specify the Vector3f coordinate of the first corner/vertex.

label: corner2
documentation: Specify the Vector3f coordinate of the second corner/vertex.

label: corner3
documentation: Specify the Vector3f coordinate of the third corner/vertex.

label: corner4
documentation: Specify the Vector3f coordinate of the final corner/vertex.

label: renderType
documentation: Specify a render type. Supported values: EXTERIOR, EXTERIOR_TRANSLUCENT, INTERIOR, INTERIOR_TRANSLUCENT, LIGHT (default), and LIGHT_TRANSLUCENT.

label: color
documentation: Specify the color tint of this quad using an RGB integer (e.g., 0xFF0000 for red).

label: texture
documentation: Assign a texture to the quad using the specified texture Identifier.

label: uv
detail: QuadDrawCall.uv(u1: float, v1: float, u2: float, v2: float): QuadDrawCall
documentation: Specify the UV coordinates ranging from 0 to 1.

label: matrices
documentation: Supply a Matrices object to apply transformations (translation, rotation, scale) to the quad.

label: ModelDrawCall
documentation: A draw call used to render complex 3D models previously loaded and uploaded via ModelManager.

label: create
documentation: Creates a new ModelDrawCall instance.

label: create
documentation: Creates a ModelDrawCall with a comment for annotation and code readability.

label: modelObject
documentation: Specify the uploaded Model object to render.

label: matrices
documentation: Supply a Matrices object to apply transformations to the entire model.
